findings.message: The execution plan's concrete implementation logs two arguments (console.error(message, { ... })), but the task acceptance and validation contract require a single structured object log. If implemented as written, TASK-01 will fail its own stated matcher shape.

The plan's overall acceptance requires TC-06 to prove console.error is not called on the happy path, but TASK-01's acceptance only formalizes extending TC-11, and the risk note scopes the spy to TC-11. That leaves the success-path assertion insufficiently bound to the task contract.

threadId is not actually a variable in scope at the catch site; only activityId and channelId are. The later plan text correctly derives threadId from channelId, so this assumption should be cleaned up for accuracy.
